title: psychotria chalconeura subsp. duboisii
intro: Psychotria chalconeura subsp. duboisii, also known as the African Blood Root, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Psychotria chalconeura subsp. duboisii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
